DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Roderick Bushnell, Esq. of BUSHNELL CAPLAN & FIELDING 217-3800, for defendant Inner Circle Entertainment II, Inc. dba Ruby Skye, and George Karpaty , demurring to amended complaint
Jessica L. Chylik, Esq. of THE EPSTEIN GROUP 863-5718, X-103, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
* The Court also heard the same motion in #419085 in this hearing.
** A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified -- DEFENDANTS INNER CIRCLE ENTERTAINMENT II, INC. DBA RUBY SKYE and GEORGE KARPATY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- RE: 2nd c/a - Demurrer sustained as to Karpaty with 10 days leave to amend. Overruled as to the Inner Circle. 3rd c/a - Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend if plaintiff can do so in good faith. The Court, on its own motion, ordered to consolidate this action with case #419085, under lead case number #419084. Defendant is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
